# materialFace

**Instance Property**

The surface of an object.

## Declaration

```swift
var materialFace: MDLMaterialFace { get set }
```

## Discussion

Determines if the material is front-facing, back-facing, or double-sided. The default case of a [doc://com.apple.modelio/documentation/ModelIO/MDLMaterial/materialFace] is [doc://com.apple.modelio/documentation/ModelIO/MDLMaterialFace/front]. For more information, see [doc://com.apple.modelio/documentation/ModelIO/MDLMaterialFace].

## Using a material

- **name**: A descriptive name for the material.
